SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT * FROM SupP発注ヘッダ WHERE 店舗コード = :1 AND 本部送信済フラグ = 0 :2

ExpSyntax.val: IF ({1,1}=0,'',' AND 伝票日付 BETWEEN'&ASCIIChr (39)&DStr ({1,2},'YYYYMMDD')&ASCIIChr (39)&' AND '&ASCIIChr (39)&DStr ({1,3},'YYYYMMDD')&ASCIIChr (39))
'差分発注ヘッダを出力中です．．．'

SQL_STMT_U.val: SELECT * FROM SupP発注明細 WHERE 店舗コード = :1 AND 本部送信済フラグ = 0 :2

ExpSyntax.val: IF ({1,1}=0,'',' AND 伝票日付 BETWEEN'&ASCIIChr (39)&DStr ({1,2},'YYYYMMDD')&ASCIIChr (39)&' AND '&ASCIIChr (39)&DStr ({1,3},'YYYYMMDD')&ASCIIChr (39))
'差分発注明細を出力中です．．．'
